dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... hmm, zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, when I was in Tartarus, I found some seeds, which grew into Poppies... like the ones that line your bedding there. What if I used them with... <Gasp> I just had an idea...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzzz, zzzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, for a moment, I thought... I almost forgot you were still here, as though... I dreamt you had already woken up...? Augh, it's nonsense. I must be weary.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzzz... zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I mustn't speak of this, Lord Hypnos, but... I was able to descend to the abyss of the subconscious, and I found my brother there...! Thank you for sparking my fascination with dream. All that I've worked for... last night, it felt in reach!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... zzzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I never could delve into the abyss of the subconscious with you, O Sleep. With my brother, the path was so clear...! Well we shall find another way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: I really thought you'd have your fill of Shiny Stars by now. I mean, you're out of stuff to trade for them, right? But you keep earning more, and more, and more!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Is that a problem, Lord Hypnos? I thought the Stars were mainly meant to indicate how accomplished I've become at these Dream Dives. Should I be holding back?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, no, keep going if you want. Besides, we won't be running out of Shiny Stars anytime soon, no matter how many you get. So if you still want more... be my guest!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Wanted to ask, Lord Hypnos, what exactly are these Shiny Stars that I've procured from some of those strange stand-ins for the greatest threats I've had to overcome?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh those are little signs you're doing a great job! Making progress toward conquering your worst worries and being able to experience pure, uninterrupted, deep sleep.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: That certainly is an enticing goal. And how many Stars would you say it requires? Perhaps you could at least approximate.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Well normally it's thirty Shiny Stars, but looks like you already have that many, huh, which means... um, I will have to look that up and then get back to you!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You mentioned something about needing thirty Shiny Stars, and then my worries would be cured. Am I supposed to feel any different in some way by now?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: For sure! You should experience a growing sense of accomplishment the more Shiny Stars you get. There's a one-to-one link! More Stars means more accomplishment, and that means better rest!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I suppose I do feel more at ease than I did before all this, when you were fast asleep within the Crossroads still...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: See? It's working! And it can work even better if you get more you-know-whats. Now dive away!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, I like what you've done with your pet! Those Shiny Stars that you've been racking up do come with certain perks! Though they're mostly for show.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: They do look beautiful. You know, it's quite amazing that you can connect with not just me through dream, but my Familiars as well! I've still so much to learn about all this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, yeah. Learning all this took me practically forever! But every living thing has dreams... and dead things, too! Now, go get yourselves more Shiny Stars, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hey, I know Dream Dives are exciting, and they're healthy for you, too, but... I just thought you'd like to know, some of the others in the House of Hades, they are getting pretty worried that the Fates haven't turned up!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Yes, well... I suppose it's not too likely that we'll find them in what seems to be my recurring dream here. I appreciate the gentle reminder.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Sure! These Dream Dives can always wait until after you've put more important matters to bed. But for now...? Let's do another one!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hey, I heard the good news! The Fates are back! Wherever they are. Personally, I never see them, seeing as I don't get out too much. Unless you count this!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I'm just relieved your sisters are safe and sound. So there's talk about them at the House! What's the mood like over there? Is everybody still in good spirits?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh absolutely! But also they're still busy cleaning up after everything that happened, you know, while I was out. So, still plenty to worry about, which is why we're both here!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, we've a beautiful sculpture in your honor now, right in our training grounds. It's like you're watching over me there during these Dream Drives.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, that old thing! Glad you found a place for it. We never could, here in the House I mean. They were going to throw it out, until I said, why not send it to you?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: But, that can't be...! Such a glorious depiction of Sleep Incarnate himself might have been simply cast aside! How utterly disrespectful...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: That's what I said! Well, what I said was aw come on, but what you said is what I meant! I guess this means you saved both the real me and the statue version, too! Thanks!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You mentioned you don't have many responsibilities right now. Have you been holding up all right? For me, when I don't have as many things to do, I start to worry, I suppose.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Well I am glad you worry because that is why you end up here. And then so do I! And that's why I've been holding up just fine. Though... thanks for asking. So, um... bye!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, I don't mean to make you feel uncomfortable but I was wondering, when you departed from the Crossroads, I remember that you said... I love you. So long. What did you mean by that...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, haha, come on, what do you think I meant? I love you! I think that's pretty clear, right? It's only three words! And I wouldn't have said them if I didn't mean them.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: But, how could you possibly love me? Even now it seems we're only starting to get to know each other. Love takes hold gradually, if at all... isn't that so?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Really? Look, you might know more about it than me, but... if not for you I wouldn't be here now! And not just anyone would do something like that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hey um you don't mind the whole I-love-you thing, do you? Because you were acting pretty funny about it last time!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Oh, well... I may be putting too much stock in the idea. Love isn't an uncommon feeling, more a range of feelings, really. But, it can be quite intense. Though, I'm grateful that you love me, and... I think I love you, too, Lord Hypnos! In a way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Aw, thanks! I don't remember the last time anybody told me that! Though I figured as much, I mean, why else would you have gone to so much trouble just for me? And kept doing Dream Dives!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Erm, Lord Hypnos, now that we've determined that we love one another... what do we do now?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: More Dream Dives, I don't know! What are we supposed to do about it? Look, can't somebody say I love you without making things weird?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I... I'm not certain either way, but... so you're saying this is love? There needn't be anything more to it than what we already have?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh we have something very special here, if you ask me, I mean, I don't do Dream Dives for just anyone! Now, let's not talk about this anymore, OK? It's making me feel funny!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, I wanted to ask... how much do you recall? About what happened to the House, and all of us.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, haha, you mean the whole dream-memories thing that none of us are supposed to talk about! Don't worry, I'm all caught up.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: So then, you must remember me. That's all I truly wanted to confirm, because... well, I just wasn't certain either way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: That is perfectly normal, especially since we're talking in a dream! You can never be too sure, and that's where worries come from! And that's where Dream Dives come in! Ready?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I must admit, Lord Hypnos... growing up in the Crossroads, with you there, peacefully asleep all the while... I wondered so often about you. And grew determined to see you wake.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Aw, thanks. I don't remember any of that stuff, myself. Just bits and pieces of a lot of scattered dreams! Most of them about my job, or my brother, or your brother, sometimes Dusa, Megaera once in a while... what was your question?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I didn't have a question, I was just... reflecting on how grateful I am to have finally met, after all this time. And that you've been willing to visit me in my own job-related dreams.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: You bet! I like dreams! Having them, making them, you name it! But I don't get to talk about them much back at the House. When I'm awake — I'm technically still there.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: So then this works out well enough for both of us. You really don't mind if we keep on meeting like this then? I don't wish to pull you away from your responsibilities.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Well, I... don't have too many responsibilities right now, seeing as the House is closed, so... I think this is great! But I can't stay forever so it's Dream Dive time, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hey, um, things are starting to pick up a little at the House lately, which is a good thing, but... it kind of means I may not be around quite as much. Work comes first, haha!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I understand completely, Lord Hypnos. Does this mean I should forego these Dream Dives moving forward, or what do you suggest?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I suggest a lot of things! But no, you can keep doing Dream Dives just as much as ever if you want, it's just I can't keep chatting with you like this for so long! Though I'll be seeing you around, OK? Thanks! Bye!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hey, uh, you haven't told anybody we've been doing Dream Dives here, have you? Because dreams can be very, very personal. And also I'm supposed to be at work.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, you mean to say you're shirking your responsibilities to my father's House, if not the realm, just to administer these Dream Dives for me? I don't want that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: No no no no no, of course you don't! Who would? The work comes first, it's just... I really like getting to do these, too. So, forget you saw me here?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: If only you didn't have to leave so soon, my lord. Several of your siblings reside with me at the Crossroads, or come visit us at least... Nemesis, Charon, Moros... even Eris. They would have liked to see you off, I'm sure.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, them! Yeah, I remember them, Charon at least. I don't know Nemesis that well, and Moros, I don't think we've met? Or maybe that was Eris. Sorry I missed them!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I keep having to remind myself you children of Nyx tend not to be that close. I suppose that's just the way it is with large families! I only met most of the Olympians not too long ago.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: I'm close with Thanatos! I know I've got other brothers and sisters, too, but he's probably my favorite. You must have favorites of your own! Mom had so many kids. Oh, Mom...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, you're... wait, you're awake...! But, you were fast asleep within the Crossroads still, I... oh. This is a dream. My dream, not yours.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: See, the thing about dreams is, sometimes, they just don't make any sense. Well, you can always make some sense out of them if you think about it long enough, but... I wouldn't do that if I were you.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I suppose I'm just imagining what you might say to me. Although, I imagined you'd be quite different than this. Well, I look forward to meeting you for real, soon enough.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Me, too! Now how about we never speak of this again, because it's so confusing that it makes me feel funny, and I don't like that! But I do like sending you on Dream Dives!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh I forgot to mention, whatever you do, if you happen to see someone you recognize during a Dream Dive, do not talk to them... OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: What? I've encountered realistic visages of both my closest comrades and my greatest foes, and we've already exchanged words. What have I done...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Um, probably nothing, it's just... there's not supposed to be much talking during Dream Dives. But, if you already started and you haven't lost your mind, I'm sure it's fine!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hey, my brother Thanatos, he has a scythe like that! Wait, maybe this is my dream after all? But then how come you're here rather than him?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Wait, you're not certain if this even is my dream? I did wonder why the intervening spaces here remind me so much of when I was in your dreams trying to wake you up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hm, come to think, Thanatos did mention someone borrowing his old scythe for a while. Though dreams can reflect our innermost desires, so seeing that thing kind of threw me off! But I am here to throw you off instead!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Well look who finally showed up! I was beginning to think you didn't want to see this place again. Or me!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Oh, Lord Hypnos, no it isn't that. I just have other responsibilities, the same as you. Perhaps you could visit the Crossroads again, and we could see each other there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh, maybe sometime, sure. But I was gone for long enough that I used up all of my vacation days-or-nights into the distant future, so... I'll probably just see you here. As long as you come back!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, according to my list, you've already completed Dream Dives using every one of those secret weapons that my mom made that I'm not even supposed to know about. Good job!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You honor me, Lord Hypnos. The Arms of Night have served me well throughout my task, so I'm not surprised that they've been equally effective in my dreams.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Yeah! Though personally I am a bit surprised. This is a dream, so if I were you, I would have dreamed up weapons way stronger than those! I would have just killed everything at once! But hey, whatever works for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, I was wondering... quite a few things, really. But, if I conquered my worst worries at this point, how come I keep facing versions of my strongest adversaries here?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Well that's easy: Because you're worrying your worries aren't gone! I mean, they aren't gone since they're still here! Maybe you like having worries! Just not the worst kind.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: ...I did fear that, once my task was complete and the House of Hades was restored, I might lack a sense of purpose anymore. You're suggesting I've manifested this?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Sure! I like suggesting things! Anyway, just because your worst worries are conquered already, doesn't mean you can't have more! And do more Dream Dives to get rid of them!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, I know I'm not supposed to worry here, but... shall I ever dream again of anything other than the reality I've grown accustomed to? This can't be it...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Aw, I thought you said you liked Dream Dives! You know you can stop doing these whenever you want, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I do, it's just... dreams have no limits...! I want to explore them as fully as I can! Imagine the impossible, visit places I have never seen...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Whoa now, look, you'll probably have other dreams at some point, but you won't be needing me for those, just these! And I'm doing my best, OK? I'm just one guy! Now come on.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Might I offer you this Nectar, as a symbol of our newfound connection and my gratitude for meeting with me thus? I hear you don't have much back at the House!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Um, this is a dream? So even if you gave me something really good, it wouldn't be there after I wake up. And either I'd feel bad about that or forget the whole thing! So no thanks.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... welcome to the how... zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: He said how? He's... trying to communicate! Lord Hypnos, I'm Melinoë, daughter of Hades, and I mean to find a way to rouse you from your slumber! Can you hear me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... a wake I'm a wake I... haha hm, zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: How is it that you sleep, even in dream? What can I do to bring you back to us? Because we need you... your own sister tells me that your wisdom and knowledge are second to none!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... so you walked... zzz... straight into... zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I walked straight into what? Lord Hypnos, I don't understand. You have to snap out of this! My time here runs short, and if this doesn't work, I... don't know what else to do...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... dream... come... true... zzz... thanks... zzz... for stopping... by... zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... hmm, tsk-tsk, hm... zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: No, his consciousness, it... slipped away from me. How am I... augh. I need to think...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... welcome to the... thanks... for dying...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I've something for you here, one moment please...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_03
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... there is... no esc... hhnnn...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos? Lord Hypnos! Can you hear me? Answer me! Anything? A twitch of the eye? Oh, come on, please!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_03
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... won't catch... mmssllppnnhhh...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: He's dreaming about... sleeping? Or about dreaming? This is beyond me still. How far has he descended...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_03
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... good old... thanuhtose... busy... allatime...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_03
dialogueLines.text: Hnn...?! Hhnnnhh...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Augh. Got farther that time, but... how many dreams are you having? But if you're dreaming of Death, perhaps... hm...

endLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
endLines.text: Sleep well for now, my lord.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: It is past time for you to wake.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You are very stubborn, my lord...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh! Hi, um, I wanted to say thanks again, for waking me up and all? I have a lot of catching up to do at work, but if not for you, I'd have way more!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, you're most welcome! I'm certain everything is better at the House now that you've finally returned. Wait, am I asleep? But now you're the one contacting me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: You bet! I kept on wondering, what can I do to pay Master's daughter back for what she did? Give her my gratitude? Already done! My affection? Worthless. And then I thought, I can make sure she gets a good night's rest!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: That's... rather generous of you, as I suppose I could use one. So, a good night's rest involves my psyche being in this unusual place, and what else, exactly?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Well I sure am glad you asked, because you are about to find out: It's what I call Dream Dives! Have you tried conquering your worst worries? Well here, you can! Eventually. But first, here's a handy brochure that'll tell you all about it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Your first Dream Dive must have worked out pretty well, because if not, you wouldn't have come back! A good night's rest deserves another, huh?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Hold a moment, Lord Hypnos. Last time we barely spoke before you whisked me off into some warped version of how my nights have gone. This is supposed to be restful?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Sure is, once you get used to it! At least it is for me! Although I get to stay here while you do the kill-everything part. But I think that's the most exciting part, don't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I just... I can't believe these dreams of mine are so specific. Am I truly so caught up in my regular routine, that even my imagination and subconscious are obsessing over it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: It happens! Though don't feel bad, because if you keep doing Dream Dives, you will conquer your worst worries, and feel refreshed like never before! Now, go on and get in there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Got some lingering worries or nightmares getting you down? Well, not for long!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Here comes your next Dive. Try not to die on this one, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: I want to see you make it all the way to the end this time! Or die along the way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: No way this Dream Dive goes as well as your last one, if you ask me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Let's see you get an even better night's rest than last time, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Up for another Dream Dive, huh? Well that's why I'm here! Why we're both here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: A good night's rest awaits! You just have to fight with everything you've got!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Where will this Dream Dive start you off? Let's go find out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: ...I better not be sleeping on the job right now. Anyway! Off you go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: A Dream Dive can take you anyplace! Or... maybe just eight places, I don't know!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Looks like you are ready for another Dive! And I know I am!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: You want a good night's rest, you've come to the right place! Which is here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: I'm glad you spend so much time asleep! Because I do, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Your brother's my best friend, and he says hi! I say it too sometimes...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you still have my brother's scythe! He never lets me borrow it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Ooh, I can just tell that this one's going to be a scary dream...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Back for more, huh? Well I can never get enough sleep either!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Don't even worry, I dream about the same stuff all the time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Oh good, you're back. Let's get you on your way! Ready?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: You must really like this dream since you keep having it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_DreamRun
dialogueLines.text: Our dreams can take us anywhere! Or places that we've been!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_04
dialogueLines.text: Zzz, hmhmhmhm... zzz, hmm, hmhmhm...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Blast it, Lord Hypnos, what is this going to take? Though... what is this, some sort of note, it says... in childlike scrawl, it says... Have you tried saying wake up? Wait, what?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_04
dialogueLines.text: <Gasp> <Yawwwn>

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: He yawned. Lord Hypnos... wake up. Wake up!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_04
dialogueLines.text: <Yawn> Welcome to the House of Ha— I, uh... wait. Where am I? What is this? Who are you?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hypnos, you're... you're here! These are the Crossroads between realms. I'm Melinoë, the daughter of Lord Hades and Persephone the Queen. Welcome!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_04
dialogueLines.text: <Yawn> Wait, wait, wait, what do you mean you're Master's daughter, you're huge, I mean you grew up fast, I mean, you were just born! Unless... unless, I, uh...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You've been in a deep slumber for... quite some time, my lord. Ever since the Titan Chronos took my father's House as I understand. We've been busy with that matter since.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_04
dialogueLines.text: ...oh no! Aah! AAAAAH! Oh no! Oh no, oh no, they'll... where'd all this Nectar come from? Oh, I'll never be the featured Houseservant again, oh no...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Wait, Lord Hypnos, calm yourself, please! Everything's all right! Especially now that you're back with us. The House is well again! Or getting there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_04
dialogueLines.text: No no no you don't understand... I am so late for work. I am so late for work! I have to go! I have to go, thanks for the wake-up call, if you see Zagreus tell him I'll be right there!

endLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
endLines.text: ...What in blazes happened, he... that's it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz, mm-hm, hmm...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: We'll find a way to wake you, O Sleep. I promise.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: May you have pleasant dreams for as long as you slumber. And if and when you finally wake... know that this Nectar shall be waiting for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzzz, welcome... to the haah, hm, zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: So often has my sleep been wracked with nightmares... memories, perhaps, of when Headmistress took me in. If your dreams are troubled too, O Sleep... you show no sign of it, at least.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... have... zzz... you tried... zzzz...

endLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
endLines.text: Did he just... have I tried what...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzz, zzzzz...

endLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
endLines.text: I bid you farewell for now, Lord Hypnos!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Your mother and the rest are safe, Lord Hypnos! They'll surely be expecting your return, and presumed you'd wake after all this, but... you're still sound asleep. Well don't worry... I made you a promise, and I intend to keep it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... zzz... zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: My memories of you from that potential past I experienced in the House of Hades... you were... so different, Lord Hypnos. Who are you, truly...? How can I finally get through to you...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz, zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzz, zzzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... hm, hm, hm, hm, hm...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... hmm, zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... hm, zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Hm-hm, zzzz... hm, zzz, hmhmhm....

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzz... zzzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzzzz... zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... mm, hmm... zzz... hmhm...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Please work... Lord Hypnos, you have slumbered long enough! I know you're lost in dream, but I shall do my best to lead you back here to reality. Now breathe in deep!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... hmmm, hm-hm...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: All right, Lord Hypnos, let's give this a new attempt. We have to get you out of there, but first, breathe deep.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... died... again... hm...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: If you are dreaming even here, then I must ask if I could see into your psyche deeper still, Lord Hypnos. Whether you let me in is up to you, but once again... breathe deep.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_01
dialogueLines.text: Hmmm... tsk, tsk, hm... zzz...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You know how it goes, Lord Hypnos, and you had better comply because, I'll admit, I'm growing just a bit impatient here. Now breathe deep!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hypnos_02
dialogueLines.text: Zzz... my list it... never...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I must see deeper into your psyche once again, my lord, so forgive the intrusion, and... here we go.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: ...All right, Lord Hypnos, one more time. You're still hiding something from me and from yourself. You must be awake somewhere in your consciousness, so let's go find you there. Breathe deep once more!
